meta.summary: StringTie assembles and quantifies RNA-seq transcripts from coordinate-sorted SAM/BAM/CRAM alignments.
meta.description: StringTie assembles and quantifies RNA-seq transcripts from coordinate-sorted SAM/BAM/CRAM alignments.

test: test "$(cat /opt/stringtie/VERSION)" = '3.0.3' && stringtie --version | grep -Fx '3.0.3' >/dev/null && ldd "$(command -v stringtie)" | grep -F 'libz' >/dev/null

stringtie -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Assemble RNA-Seq alignments into potential transcripts.' >/dev/null && stringtie -h 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--merge' >/dev/null && stringtie -h 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--mix' >/dev/null && stringtie -h 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--nasc' >/dev/null

prepDE.py3 -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Generates two CSV files' >/dev/null && prepDE.py -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Generates two CSV files' >/dev/null && python3 -c 'import csv, glob, itertools, optparse, re, warnings'

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-stringtie-short && cd /tmp/taf-stringtie-short && stringtie -o short.gtf /opt/stringtie/tests/short_reads.bam >/tmp/taf-stringtie-short/run.log 2>&1 && test -s short.gtf && grep -F 'transcript' short.gtf >/dev/null && grep -F 'FPKM' short.gtf >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-stringtie-long && cd /tmp/taf-stringtie-long && stringtie -L -G /opt/stringtie/tests/human-chr19_P.gff -o long_guided.gtf /opt/stringtie/tests/long_reads.bam >/tmp/taf-stringtie-long/run.log 2>&1 && test -s long_guided.gtf && grep -F 'reference_id' long_guided.gtf >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-stringtie-mix && cd /tmp/taf-stringtie-mix && stringtie --mix -G /opt/stringtie/tests/mix_guides.gff -o mix_guided.gtf /opt/stringtie/tests/mix_short.bam /opt/stringtie/tests/mix_long.bam >/tmp/taf-stringtie-mix/mix.log 2>&1 && test -s mix_guided.gtf && grep -F 'transcript' mix_guided.gtf >/dev/null && stringtie -N -G /opt/stringtie/tests/mix_guides.gff -o nascent.gtf /opt/stringtie/tests/mix_short.bam >/tmp/taf-stringtie-mix/nascent.log 2>&1 && test -s nascent.gtf && stringtie --nasc -G /opt/stringtie/tests/mix_guides.gff -o nasc.gtf /opt/stringtie/tests/mix_short.bam >/tmp/taf-stringtie-mix/nasc.log 2>&1 && grep -F 'nascentRNA' nasc.gtf >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-stringtie-merge && cd /tmp/taf-stringtie-merge && printf '%s\n' /opt/stringtie/tests/short_reads.out_expected.gtf /opt/stringtie/tests/long_reads.out_expected.gtf > gtf.list && stringtie --merge -o merged.gtf gtf.list >/tmp/taf-stringtie-merge/merge.log 2>&1 && test -s merged.gtf && grep -F 'transcript' merged.gtf >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-stringtie-expression/sample1 && cd /tmp/taf-stringtie-expression && printf 'sample1\t/tmp/taf-stringtie-expression/sample1/sample.gtf\n' > samples.txt && stringtie -e -B -G /opt/stringtie/tests/human-chr19_P.gff -o sample1/sample.gtf /opt/stringtie/tests/long_reads.bam >/tmp/taf-stringtie-expression/run.log 2>&1 && test -s sample1/sample.gtf && test -s sample1/t_data.ctab && grep -F 'TPM' sample1/sample.gtf >/dev/null && prepDE.py3 -i samples.txt -g gene_count_matrix.csv -t transcript_count_matrix.csv >/tmp/taf-stringtie-expression/prepde.log 2>&1 && test -s gene_count_matrix.csv && test -s transcript_count_matrix.csv && grep -F 'gene_id' gene_count_matrix.csv >/dev/null

upstream.name: StringTie
upstream.license: MIT with bundled third-party source components in the offline package
upstream.citation: Pertea et al. 2015; Pertea et al. 2016; Kovaka et al. 2019; Shumate et al. 2022; Shinder et al. 2025 preprint for StringTie 3
